texto: Freedom and wealth is an outcome of “Time”; the most precious asset that we all possess. Time however is a variable to each individual as our actions from our choices determine the longevity and returns from this asset. To maximize the return on this asset is determined by the energy that we put forth in developing our financial education, relationships and health.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Scott Burton sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “Freedom and wealth is an outcome of “Time”; the most precious asset that we all possess. Time how…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a educacao, financial-freedom, financial-planning, útil em momentos de financial-planning e personal-growth.
